testcase.name: test_feed_has_cache_control

failure.message: AssertionError: Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate assert ('max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' or 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate') + where 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0> = 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'.lower + and 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0> = 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'.lower

testcase.failure: tests/test_pinterest_phase2_live.py:88: in test_feed_has_cache_control assert "max-age" in cc.lower() or "public" in cc.lower(), f"Cache-Control: {cc}" E AssertionError: Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate E assert ('max-age' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' or 'public' in 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate') E + where 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0> = 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'.lower E + and 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfc07cf041bf0> = 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate'.lower
